name: intel-workbench-monorepo
description: 情报分析工作台 — 离线智能情报处理与多模态分析系统（monorepo: core 运行时 + server + web）。

scripts.build: npm run build -w mini-agent && npm run build -w @intel-workbench/server && npm run build -w @intel-workbench/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w mini-agent && npm run typecheck -w @intel-workbench/server && npm run typecheck -w @intel-workbench/web
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test:run
